subject: [PATCH v3 0/4] mm: improve write performance with RWF_DONTCACHE

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve write performance when using the RWF_DONTCACHE flag, which prevents caching of written data. The main change is a new scheme that kicks the flusher thread after a DONTCACHE write, causing it to perform writeback proportional to the amount written. This approach was suggested by Jan Kara and Christoph Hellwig during review of an earlier series. The patch also includes benchmark results in the last two patches, which show this method working as well or better than previous approaches.
